seoTitle: Angle Vale vs Annadale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Angle Vale and Annadale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Angle Vale vs Annadale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Angle Vale and Annadale.
heading: Angle Vale vs Annadale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Angle Vale, South Australia and Annadale, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Annadale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Angle Vale (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Angle Vale or Annadale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Angle Vale has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Annadale scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Angle Vale scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Annadale scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Angle Vale or Annadale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Annadale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
